__doc__: Spec 065 D1+D2 regression baseline. Retrieval metrics are TOP-LEVEL because mcp-eval RetrievalScorer reads baseline["recall_at"]["5"] etc. directly (quickstart §4: --baseline datasets/baseline_v1.json). The CI gate (FR-009/MCP-742) fails if a fresh Recall@5 < baseline.recall_at[5] - tolerance.recall_at_5. The "security" section is appended by the D2 issue (CN-004); it is intentionally empty here.

generated_from.mcpproxy: BM25 index over corpus_v1 (45 tools, 7 no-auth reference servers)
generated_from.note: Reference = current BM25 behavior, a regression anchor (NOT a quality target). Refresh requires re-freezing corpus + re-review.
